name: NeoVolta Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are a designer and manufacturer of high-performance energy storage systems (ESS) for residential and commercial applications. Our product portfolio includes the NV14, NV24, NVPlus, NV7600 stand-alone inverter, and most recently, the NV16 kW AC hybrid inverter with 24 kW PV input and a 250 kW / 430 kWh commercial and industrial (C&I) system.
